title: I need to know everything there is to know about evangelion
display_title: I need to know everything there is to know about evangelion
wikitext:
[]: I need to know everything there is to know about evangelion             Quote Post by Desty_Nova » Tue Jun 23, 2009 9:14 am I've enjoyed eva ever since it first came out on VHS in english but thre are still huge gaps in my 'understanding' of eva plz tell me where to start. Thankyou

[]:             Quote Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Tue Jun 23, 2009 9:56 am the anime of which this entire forum is based upon would be a good start.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Tue Jun 23, 2009 10:38 am xtr00kvltcorex wrote: the anime of which this entire forum is based upon would be a good start.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jun 23, 2009 11:15 am Is there something in particular you didn't understand? That information would help us direct you better.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Tue Jun 23, 2009 11:54 am Some of the people who have watched and studied the series for a long time don't even understand it. You just have to watch it closely and be patient.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 23, 2009 4:16 pm If you don't have the Platinum edition of the series, that's your first step. It has better visuals/sound quality then the original release(s) and the translation is extremely accurate. Also, a fansub of the Renewal Feature Films (Death and End of Evangelion) is good, since awful mangle's translation is awful. Besides that, just reading different parts of the wiki (although keep in mind it needs work and isn't entirely accurate in some parts) and posting in threads you want to understand better should help. Best of luck to you!

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Tue Jun 23, 2009 4:27 pm WELL THEN, YOU'VE COME TO THE RIGHT PLACE!

[]: Re: I need to know everything there is to know about evangel             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 23, 2009 4:35 pm Desty_Nova wrote: plz tell me where to start.

[]: Re: I need to know everything there is to know about evangel             Quote Post by Rommel » Tue Jun 23, 2009 9:46 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Desty_Nova wrote: plz tell me where to start.

[]: Re: I need to know everything there is to know about evangel             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Jun 23, 2009 11:26 pm Desty_Nova wrote: I've enjoyed eva ever since it first came out on VHS in english but thre are still huge gaps in my 'understanding' of eva plz tell me where to start. Thankyou

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Jun 24, 2009 12:30 am Geez, everyone sure did beat around the bush. Finally, PRPD saved the day. I would have never believed it if I hadn't seen it. EDIT: Sorry Baz. PRPD, try again next time.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Wed Jun 24, 2009 2:17 am Baz wrote: Some parts of the EvaGeeks wiki are good introductory material. The Wiki "Evapedia" is the best place to start, particularly "What is Canon" and "Mythos".

[]:             Quote Post by Desty_Nova » Wed Jun 24, 2009 7:13 am Thanks ppl, I'm reading the super-juicy info and it's making a lot of sense. Hey does anyone know why /m/ hates Eva and Ayanami so much? and does there exist a diagram of the layout of the geofront? PS: what is the basis for the theory that part of reis soul is in eva00? I remember back when I first watched eva it was beleived that the soul in unit00 was in fact that of ritsukos mother???

[]:             Quote Post by Zaque » Wed Jun 24, 2009 8:45 am [url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Theory_and_Analysis:Eva-00%27s_Soul[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Wed Jun 24, 2009 9:02 am Huge collection of production images here: http://www.evacommentary.org/supplemental-images.html Specifically, Geofront dimensions.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jun 24, 2009 10:40 am Baz wrote: Huge collection of production images here: http://www.evacommentary.org/supplemental-images.html Specifically, Geofront dimensions.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jun 24, 2009 1:20 pm I also suggest my archive of articles and essays. The authoritativeness varies, but there's quite a bit to chew on. http://www.evamonkey.com/em_writings.php

[]:             Quote Post by Conzy91 » Fri Jun 26, 2009 4:53 pm Desty_Nova wrote: PS: what is the basis for the theory that part of reis soul is in eva00? I remember back when I first watched eva it was beleived that the soul in unit00 was in fact that of ritsukos mother???
